AddAgenda.description: The API for adding a agenda item includes content, time and location.
AddAgenda.name: AddAgenda

AddAlarm.description: The API for setting an alarm includes a parameter for the alarm time.
AddAlarm.name: AddAlarm

AddMeeting.description: This API allows users to make a reservation for a meeting and store the meeting information (e.g., topic, time, location, attendees) in the database.
AddMeeting.name: AddMeeting

attendees.description: The attendees of the meeting, including names, positions and other information.

end_time.description: The end time of the meeting, in the pattern of %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S

location.description: The location where the meeting to be held, no more than 100 characters.

meeting_topic.description: The title of the meeting, no more than 50 characters.

start_time.description: The start time of the meeting, in the pattern of %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S

AddReminder.description: The API for adding a reminder item includes content and time.
AddReminder.name: AddReminder

AddScene.description: This API adds a scene of smart home system, given the scene name and a list of smart devices
AddScene.name: AddScene

devices.description: The list of smart devices, containing the name and description. Format be like [{"name": "light", "description": "Smart light in the kitchen"}, {"name": "oven", "description": "Smart oven in the kitchen"}, {"name": "range hood", "description": "Smart range hood in the kitchen"}]

AppointmentRegistration.description: This API registers an appointment of hospital.
AppointmentRegistration.name: AppointmentRegistration

date.description: The date of appointment. Format be like %Y-%m-%d

BookHotel.description: This API orders a hotel room. Two rooms are ordered if the number of adults is greater than 2. Only one order can be made at same time.
BookHotel.name: BookHotel

check_in_time.description: The time to check in. Format: %Y-%m-%d

check_out_time.description: The time to check out. Format: %Y-%m-%d

room_count.description: The number of rooms to order.

Calculator.description: This API provides basic arithmetic operations: addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division.
Calculator.name: Calculator

formula.description: The formula that needs to be calculated. Only integers are supported. Valid operators are +, -, *, /, and (, ). For example, '(1 + 2) * 3'.

CancelRegistration.description: This API cancels the registration of a patient given appointment ID.
CancelRegistration.name: CancelRegistration

CancelTimedSwitch.description: Cancels a timed switch for a smart device.
CancelTimedSwitch.name: CancelTimedSwitch

name.description: The name of the smart device.

time.description: The time to switch the device on or off. Format: %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S

DeleteAgenda.description: The API for deleting a schedule item includes parameters for token, content, time, and location.
DeleteAgenda.name: DeleteAgenda

DeleteAlarm.description: The API for removing an alarm includes a parameter for the time.
DeleteAlarm.name: DeleteAlarm

DeleteMeeting.description: This API allows users to delete a reservation for a meeting and remove the meeting information in the database.
DeleteMeeting.name: DeleteMeeting

attendees.description: The attendees of the meeting, including names, positions and other information.

end_time.description: The end time of the meeting, in the pattern of %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S

location.description: The location where the meeting to be held, no more than 100 characters.

meeting_topic.description: The title of the meeting, no more than 50 characters.

start_time.description: The start time of the meeting, in the pattern of %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S

DeleteReminder.description: The API for deleting a reminder item includes content and time.
DeleteReminder.name: DeleteReminder

DeleteScene.description: This API deletes a scene by its name.
DeleteScene.name: DeleteScene

Dictionary.description: This API searches the dictionary for a given keyword.
Dictionary.name: Dictionary

DocumentQA.description: This API answers the question from a given document url.
DocumentQA.name: DocumentQA

url.description: The url to download the document. It should end with .txt.

EmergencyKnowledge.description: This API searches for a given symptom for emergency knowledge.
EmergencyKnowledge.name: EmergencyKnowledge

ForgotPassword.description: Sends an email to the user with a link to reset the password. Need call twice, first with 'Forgot Password' status to get the verification code, then call again with 'Verification Code' status to change the password. Must pass the name of the parameters when calling the API, like ForgotPassword(status='Forgot Password', username='username').
ForgotPassword.name: ForgotPassword

email.description: The email of the user. Only needed for the first call.

new_password.description: The new password of the user. Only needed for the second call.

status.description: 'Forgot Password' for first call, after get the verification code, call again with 'Verification Code' to change the password.

username.description: The username of the user. Only needed for the first call.

verification_code.description: The verification code sent to the user. Only needed for the second call.

GetUserToken.description: Get the user token by username and password.
GetUserToken.name: GetUserToken

ImageCaption.description: This API generates a caption for a given image.
ImageCaption.name: ImageCaption

url.description: The url to download the image. It should end with .jpg, .jpeg or .png.

ModifyAgenda.description: The API for modifying a schedule item includes parameters for content, time, and location.
ModifyAgenda.name: ModifyAgenda

location.description: The new location of the agenda.

time.description: The new time for agenda. Format: %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S

ModifyAlarm.description: The API for modifying an alarm includes a parameter for the from_time to to_time.
ModifyAlarm.name: ModifyAlarm

from_time.description: The time for alarm which changed from. Format: %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S

to_time.description: The time for alarm which changed to. Format: %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S

ModifyMeeting.description: This API allows users to modify a reservation for a meeting
ModifyMeeting.name: ModifyMeeting

attendees.description: The attendees of the meeting, including names, positions and other information.

end_time.description: The end time of the meeting, in the pattern of %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S

location.description: The location where the meeting to be held, no more than 100 characters.

meeting_topic.description: The title of the meeting, no more than 50 characters.

start_time.description: The start time of the meeting, in the pattern of %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S

ModifyPassword.description: The API for modifying the password of the account.
ModifyPassword.name: ModifyPassword

new_password.description: The new password of the user.

old_password.description: The old password of the user.

ModifyRegistration.description: This API modifies the registration of a patient given appointment ID.
ModifyRegistration.name: ModifyRegistration

ModifyReminder.description: The API for deleting a reminder item includes content and time.
ModifyReminder.name: ModifyReminder

ModifyScene.description: This API modifies a scene of smart home system, given the scene name and a list of smart devices
ModifyScene.name: ModifyScene

devices.description: The list of smart devices, containing the name and description.

OpenBankAccount.description: This is an API for opening a bank account for a user, given the account, password and name.
OpenBankAccount.name: OpenBankAccount

PlayMusic.description: This API triggers a music player to play music.
PlayMusic.name: PlayMusic

music_name.description: The name of the music to play.

QueryAgenda.description: The API for getting a schedule item includes parameters for token, content, time, and location.
QueryAgenda.name: QueryAgenda

QueryAlarm.description: The API for querying alarm clock, help user to check the alarm clock they have set.
QueryAlarm.name: QueryAlarm

QueryBalance.description: This API queries the balance of a given user.
QueryBalance.name: QueryBalance

QueryHealthData.description: This API queries the recorded health data in database of a given user and time span.
QueryHealthData.name: QueryHealthData

end_time.description: The end time of the time span. Format: %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S

start_time.description: The start time of the time span. Format: %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S

user_id.description: The user id of the given user. Cases are ignored.

QueryHistoryToday.description: This API queries the history of the given date.
QueryHistoryToday.name: QueryHistoryToday

date.description: The date of the history. Format: %m-%d

QueryMeeting.description: This API allows users to query the information of a meeting.
QueryMeeting.name: QueryMeeting

attendees.description: The attendees of the meeting, including names, positions and other information.

end_time.description: The end time of the meeting, in the pattern of %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S

location.description: The location where the meeting to be held, no more than 100 characters.

meeting_topic.description: The title of the meeting, no more than 50 characters.

start_time.description: The start time of the meeting, in the pattern of %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S

QueryRegistration.description: This API queries the registration of a patient, given patient ID.
QueryRegistration.name: QueryRegistration

date.description: The date of appointment. Format be like %Y-%m-%d

QueryReminder.description: The API for querying a reminder item includes content and time.
QueryReminder.name: QueryReminder

time.description: The time for the reminder. Format: %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S

QueryScene.description: This API queries a scene of smart home system, given the scene name
QueryScene.name: QueryScene

QueryStock.description: This API queries the stock price of a given stock code and date.
QueryStock.name: QueryStock

date.description: The date of the stock price. Format: %Y-%m-%d

stock_code.description: The stock code of the given stock.

RecordHealthData.description: This API records the health data of a user.
RecordHealthData.name: RecordHealthData

health_data.description: The health data, with the format like [{'name': 'blood_pressure', 'value': '120/80'}, {'name': 'heart_rate', 'value': '80'}]

time.description: The time of health data. Format: %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S

RegisterUser.description: The API for registering a account, given the username, password and email.
RegisterUser.name: RegisterUser

SearchEngine.description: This API searches for a given keyword for search engine.
SearchEngine.name: SearchEngine

SendEmail.description: This API for sending email, given the receiver, subject and content.
SendEmail.name: SendEmail

receiver.description: The receiver address of the email.

subject.description: The subject address of the email.

SpeechRecognition.description: This API recognizes the speech from a given audio url.
SpeechRecognition.name: SpeechRecognition

url.description: The url to download the audio. It should end with .wav.

SymptomSearch.description: This API searches for a given symptom.
SymptomSearch.name: SymptomSearch

TimedSwitch.description: This API for setting a timed switch for a smart device.
TimedSwitch.name: TimedSwitch

name.description: The name of the smart device.

on.description: Whether to switch the device on or off.

time.description: The time to switch the device on or off. Format: %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S

ToolSearcher.description: Searches for relevant tools in library based on the keywords.
ToolSearcher.name: ToolSearcher

Translate.description: Translate the text to the target language.
Translate.name: Translate

src_lang.description: [Optional] The source language to translate from. Default is auto.

tgt_lang.description: [Optional] The target language to translate to. Default is english/en.

Wiki.description: This API for searching a keyword in Wikipedia.
Wiki.name: Wiki
